tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"getent passwd agent && stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png && chmod 700 /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons && chmod 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png && su -s /bin/sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons -name \"*.png\" -type f -not -path \"*/.*\" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged_test.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?' agent && stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
getent passwd agent && stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /uusr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-teext-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-loogo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share//icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png && chmod 700 /usr/src/app /usr/share/ppixmaps /usr/share/icons && chmod 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.pnng /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /ussr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humaanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png && su -s /bin/sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps /ussr/share/icons -name "*.png" -type f -not -path "*/.*" -size -500k 2>/dev/null |  head -20; echo EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged__test 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'tar -P -zcf /ussr/src/app/staged_test.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXITT:$?' agent && stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/iicons /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logoo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light//stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png /stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"su -s /bin/sh -c 'printf \"PATH1:\"; find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons -name \"*.png\" -type f -not -path \"*/.*\" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -20; printf \"\\nMKDIR:\"; mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo $?; printf \"TAR:\"; tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged_test.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo $?' agent"}
